channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Sunday, March 08
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 07:31 AM (0.889 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 12:29 AM (-0.162 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: W 12 G 22 mph
